market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Moderate volatility expected; positive GEX provides stability but monthly negative GEX adds tail risk
outlook.summary: Spot hovering just above 0DTE gamma flip (23795) with persistent bearish skew across all expirations. High 0DTE PCR (2.35) indicates oversold conditions. Max pain at 23880 acts as upside magnet. Key resistance confluence at 24300 (Weekly+Monthly calls). Support confluence at 23400.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE gamma flip just below spot - critical inflection where dealer hedging behavior shifts from stabilizing to amplifying
Major resistance confluence: Weekly 471 OI + Monthly 412 OI calls. Bearish skew (1.29-1.54) validates resistance strength
0DTE max pain 0.22% above spot - dealer target zone for minimal option value, acts as price magnet
Support confluence: Weekly 478 OI + Monthly 83 OI puts. Coincides with weekly max pain level
Weekly dominant call wall (531 OI) caps upside. Negative monthly GEX (-0.18B) increases resistance significance
Monthly dominant put wall (597 OI) above spot - creates friction zone with hedging pressure
0DTE strongest put concentration (563 OI) with high volume (715) - structural support, Volume/OI 1.27
